rationale: This is mostly planning notes, not the requested consumer explainer. It is somewhat understandable and uses fairly plain language, but the meta format, outline style, and abrupt cutoff make it incomplete and poorly suited to readers. It includes a few concrete details, yet lacks a finished structure, smooth flow, and human-facing voice.
